banner.subtitle: More than a car rental
banner.slogan: All roads lead to us, all paths start from us

auto.title: Wide range of cars:
auto.description: We offer various cars for any occasion - from economy models to comfortable and premium class.

rent.title: Flexible rental terms:
rent.description: You can rent a car for any period - from a few hours to several weeks. Choose the option that suits you!

security.title: Safety and reliability:
security.description: All our cars undergo regular maintenance and are in excellent condition, ensuring road safety.

simple.title: Easy registration:
simple.description: We have made the rental process as simple and fast as possible so you can focus on what's important.

money.title: Competitive prices:
money.description: We offer the best rental conditions at affordable prices, with no hidden fees.

price.title: Flexible rates:
price.description: We offer various rates, including rentals with and without a driver, so you can choose the right option.

carCards.title: Frequently Rented Cars
carCards.description: Want comfort, safety and confidence on the road? We offer car rentals suitable for any purpose - from city trips to country adventures. Trust us, as hundreds of customers choose us every day!

formContact.title: Get in touch with us
formContact.helpText: Need help? Use the form to contact us!
formContact.thankYouText: We have received your message and will respond to you shortly.
